body.title: Defer machine_manager IGOR_HOME_DB_URL check from import to first call
body.result: Shipped in 4c444981. Wrapped the env guard in _db_url() helper called from _pg_connect. Subprocess test confirms import now succeeds without IGOR_HOME_DB_URL set; 4 new tests validate import + connect-time guard + _db_url helper.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 5 Gap 7 (SHIP). lab/utility_closet/machine_manager.py:34-39 raises RuntimeError at module load if IGOR_HOME_DB_URL is unset. This breaks static imports in any env without a live DB — test discovery, type-checkers, audit tools. Move the guard into _pg_connect (first actual use) so the failure mode matches every other DB-dependent module in the codebase.

**Affected files:** lab/utility_closet/machine_manager.py (lines 34-39 → move to _pg_connect).
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — moving the guard. OUT — behavior changes at runtime (connect still fails with same error, just at first-connect instead of import).
**Test plan:** add test that imports machine_manager with IGOR_HOME_DB_URL unset in the env — must succeed. Then call _pg_connect with env unset and assert RuntimeError with the same message.
